description: Declarative wrap profiles for harness binaries that need special capture (base-URL override, env proxy, settings files, credential import). Update a profile here when a harness changes knobs — no code change required for env renames.

template_vars.wrap_base_url: URL of the local reverse wrap or HTTP proxy (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:4101)
template_vars.credential: Resolved API key / token for this harness
template_vars.capture_dir: Per-run directory for logs, settings dumps, flow jsonl
template_vars.ca_cert_path: Optional PEM CA for TLS-trusting clients (env_proxy mode)
template_vars.settings_path: Resolved settings file path for this run

amp.description: Sourcegraph Amp CLI. Inference rides actor WebSocket; AMP_URL funnels all API+WS to the wrap. amp.proxy alone misses the actor stream; HTTPS_PROXY env does not.

upstream.notes: Reverse wrap forwards management + actor traffic here when mode is base_url.

reverse_inject.notes: Amp hardcodes Rivet public token as URL password only for non-localhost AMP_URL. When wrap binds on 127.0.0.1, the CLI omits rvt-token and production closes WS with guard.missing_header. Inject the public gateway token on actor paths.

base_url.description: AMP_URL / amp.url reverse wrap — single choke point for REST + actor WS path routing.
base_url.notes: Keys are scoped per AMP_URL; always pass AMP_API_KEY (or re-import) when pointing at localhost.

env_proxy.description: HTTP(S)_PROXY env for clients that honor process proxy (captures actor WS when TLS is trusted).
env_proxy.notes: Requires a TLS-capable HTTP proxy and CA trust. Do not confuse with amp.proxy settings (WS bypasses that).

amp_proxy_setting.description: amp.proxy settings only — incomplete (misses actor WebSocket). Kept for diagnostics.
amp_proxy_setting.notes: Diagnostic-only: REST is captured, actor stream is not.

agent.description: Cursor Agent CLI. Hidden --endpoint points the Connect/Web/WS API at the local reverse wrap for capture.

upstream.notes: Cursor Agent backend endpoint used by the CLI.

base_url.description: Cursor Agent --endpoint reverse wrap — captures CLI API traffic without TLS MITM.
base_url.notes: Uses existing Cursor login unless CURSOR_API_KEY/CURSOR_AUTH_TOKEN is supplied. Use -- after alex args before agent flags.
